warmups.name: Arm Circles & Wrist Rolls
warmups.notes: Forward/backward arm circles, then roll your wrists to prep for pushing/pulling.

warmups.name: Jumping Jacks
warmups.notes: Get your heart rate up and blood flowing to the muscles.

warmups.name: Cat-Cow & Downward Dog
warmups.notes: Mobilize the spine and stretch the hamstrings/calves.

cooldowns.name: Child's Pose
cooldowns.notes: Sit back on your heels, stretch arms forward to decompress lower back.

cooldowns.name: Doorway Chest Stretch
cooldowns.notes: Place forearm on a doorframe and gently turn away to stretch the pecs.

cooldowns.name: Standing Quad Stretch
cooldowns.notes: Pull your heel to your glute to stretch the front of your legs.

exercises.name: Pull-ups (or Negatives)
exercises.notes: Use controlled negatives if you can't do full reps yet.

exercises.name: Push-ups
exercises.notes: As many reps as possible. Drop to knees when failing.

exercises.name: Pike Push-ups
exercises.notes: Hips high in the air. Builds shoulders.

exercises.name: Scapular Pull-ups
exercises.notes: Hang with straight arms, shrug shoulders down and back. Good for traps.

exercises.name: Chin-ups (or Negatives)
exercises.notes: Palms facing you (supinated grip). Directly targets biceps. Use slow negatives if can't do full reps.

exercises.name: Chair Dips
exercises.notes: Hands on the edge of a sturdy chair behind you, feet out. Lower until elbows hit 90°. Targets triceps.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squats
exercises.notes: Go deep, keep chest up.

exercises.name: Walking Lunges
exercises.notes: Keep torso upright to target the quads and glutes.

exercises.name: Glute Bridges
exercises.notes: Squeeze glutes hard at the top. Pause for 2 seconds.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Glute Bridge
exercises.notes: Lift one leg off the ground and drive through the planted heel. Strongly targets hamstrings and glutes unilaterally.

exercises.name: Nordic Curl Negatives
exercises.notes: Anchor feet under a heavy chair. Slowly lower your body to the floor using your hamstrings. Best hamstring builder with no equipment.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raises
exercises.notes: Hold onto a wall for balance, stretch calf at the bottom.

exercises.name: Long Walk
exercises.notes: Keep a brisk pace to burn fat without taxing the nervous system.

exercises.name: Full Body Stretch
exercises.notes: Focus on chest, hips, and hamstrings.

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raises
exercises.notes: Hang from pull-up bar, tuck knees to chest. Targets lower abs.

exercises.name: Plank Hold
exercises.notes: Keep core tight, don't let hips sag.

exercises.name: Side Planks
exercises.notes: Targets the obliques.

exercises.name: Superman Holds
exercises.notes: Lie on stomach, raise arms and legs. Crucial for lower back.

exercises.name: Prone Y-T-W Raises
exercises.notes: Lie face down, raise arms into Y, T, and W shapes. Directly targets rear delts, rhomboids, and lower traps — essential for posture and shoulder health.

exercises.name: Burpees
exercises.notes: Explosive movement for fat loss and full body conditioning.

exercises.name: Jump Squats
exercises.notes: Squat down and explode upwards. Lands softly.

exercises.name: Decline Push-ups
exercises.notes: Feet elevated on a chair or bed. Hits upper chest.

exercises.name: Pull-up Bar Hangs
exercises.notes: Grip endurance and shoulder health.

exercises.name: Yoga Flow
exercises.notes: Follow a basic vinyasa flow to stretch out all the week's tension.

exercises.name: Brisk Walk
exercises.notes: Get outside, clear your mind, and hit those daily steps.

exercises.name: Optional Light Walk
exercises.notes: Very light pace, just to keep the blood flowing.
